title: russelia sarmentosa
intro: Russelia sarmentosa, also known as Queen of the Night or Coral Plant, is a flowering plant native to Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its high content of flavonoids and terpenoids. The health benefits of Russelia sarmentosa include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
